nasb.text: Nevertheless, each individual among you also is to love his own wife even as himself, and the wife must see to it that she respects her husband.

esv.text: However, let each one of you love his wife as himself, and let the wife see that she respects her husband.

cnv.text: 無論怎樣，你們各人都要愛自己的妻子，好像愛自己一樣。妻子也應當敬重丈夫。

ccb.text: 总之，你们做丈夫的都要爱妻子如同爱自己，做妻子的也要敬重丈夫。

csbs.text: 不过，你们每一个人也要爱自己的妻子，就像爱自己一样；而妻子要敬重丈夫。
